title: kernel CVE-2024-0607
description: A flaw was found in the netfilter subsystem in the Linux kernel. The `nft_byteorder_eval()` function iterates through writing 8 bytes per iteration to an array of 4 byte fields, effectively overwriting part of the previously written element. This could lead to a local user with CAP_NET_ADMIN access privilege causing a denial of service or breaking netfilter functionality.
